query:
-- فحص سجلات workerDailyFinance للفترة 2026-02-01 إلى 2026-02-02
SELECT 
  wdf.id,
  wdf.worker_id,
  w.full_name,
  w.code,
  wdf.work_date,
  wdf.base_amount,
  wdf.deductions,
  wdf.bonuses,
  wdf.net_amount,
  wdf.locked_batch_id,
  wdf.created_at
FROM worker_daily_finance wdf
JOIN workers w ON wdf.worker_id = w.id
WHERE wdf.work_date BETWEEN '2026-02-01' AND '2026-02-02'
ORDER BY wdf.worker_id, wdf.work_date;

-- فحص التجاوزات المالية للفترة
SELECT 
  po.id,
  po.worker_id,
  w.full_name,
  po.override_date,
  po.override_type,
  po.amount,
  po.status,
  po.reason
FROM pay_overrides po
JOIN workers w ON po.worker_id = w.id
WHERE po.override_date BETWEEN '2026-02-01' AND '2026-02-02'
ORDER BY po.worker_id, po.override_date;
